objective: Run comprehensive benchmarks for ibis-profiling and ydata-profiling, optimizing for speed and memory usage, and ensuring statistical parity.
design_decisions: Optimized benchmarking strategy: Full+Minimal for <500k rows, Minimal only for >=500k rows.
Implemented aggressive memory cleanup (gc.collect, del) and disk cleanup (rm parquet) in benchmark runner.
Handled DuckDB OutOfRange errors by treating NaNs as NULLs in statistical aggregations.
Manual Pearson correlation calculation to bypass DuckDB NaN handling issues.
Standardized alert schema to use 'alert_type' for parity with ydata-profiling JSON.

results.statistical_parity: Verified on 50k dataset with minor discrepancies noted in skewness and missing cell counts (Ibis treats NaNs as NULLs differently than Pandas).
